task:
@apps/web/src/app/home/video-player/ @libs/ui/components/src/lib/art-player/ i got feedback for the app "Hello,
I am using the latest IPTVnator version (v0.19.0 Windows x64) and I noticed that there is no option to switch audio tracks during playback.
Many IPTV streams contain multiple audio tracks (for example ENG / RUS / LT), and players based on hls.js or Video.js usually support switching between them. IPTVnator also uses these engines as described in the documentation. [iptvtalk.net]
However, in the current IPTVnator UI there is no audio menu and no way to select a different audio track, even in streams where multiple tracks are definitely available.
Could you please confirm:

Is audio track switching currently not implemented in the UI?
If not, can this feature be added in upcoming releases?

This feature is very important for multilingual IPTV streams and would greatly improve usability.
Thank you for your work on this project." . can you check and add this support to videojs player (hls.js) and artplayer. i think there should be plugins for that or?
can not see the button in videojs player, where should it be, can you maybe add logs to see if audio tracks are available for live tv channel
user_feedback_text: can not see the button in videojs player, where should it be, can you maybe add logs to see if audio tracks are available for live tv channel
